violations.text: The hand-washing sink observed in the 3-bay sink area was blocked by boxes and chair. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. PIC moved boxes and chair. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/07/2025
Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in 3-bay area. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. New Violation. Correct By: 04/07/2025

Observed the following chemicals (Mr. Clean, Air Fresher, Foam skin cleanser, little bottle with red substance and orange clean) stored above 3-bay sink during time of inspection. Chemicals must be stored to prevent the contamination of clean equipment, utensils linens, and/or single service by spacing or partitioning and locating them in an area that is not above food, equipment utensils, linens, and single service articles. PIC relocated following chemicals to designated area during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/07/2025

The door to the outside, located in the front area, back area and car wash sliding door area, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 04/28/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the fans located in walk-in beverage cooler has an accumulation of dust. Informed PIC. New Violation. Correct By: 04/21/2025

The outside dumpster side door was observed opened. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept closed after every uses. Staff closed dumpster door at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/07/2025
Observed mop in stagnant water during time of inspection. Mops must be allowed to air dry after use. Reviewed proper mop drying with PIC. New Violation. Correct By: 04/07/2025

Thermometers are lacking in the sandwich refrigeration unit. Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 12/14/2023
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3-bay. New Violation. Correct By: 12/14/2023

A hose is connected to the faucet at the mop sink. This faucet is lacking a backflow prevention device. An approved backflow prevention device is required in order to prevent backflow of a solid, liquid, or gas contaminant into the water supply at each point of use at a food establishment. New Violation. Correct By: 12/14/2023
The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 12/14/2023
